frame_analyses.description: Laparoscopic trainer box visible with gauze material suspended between clamps, circular cutting pattern marked
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Pre-task setup appears appropriate with gauze properly positioned

frame_analyses.description: Hands inserting laparoscopic instruments through ports, preparing to grasp gauze
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Bilateral instrument insertion, good port utilization

frame_analyses.description: Scissors positioned at gauze, beginning to cut along marked circular line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Scissors properly oriented, gauze under appropriate tension

frame_analyses.description: Progressing around circular pattern in clockwise direction, maintaining cut line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion, gauze remains attached to clamps

frame_analyses.description: Continuing cutting pattern, approaching completion of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent technique maintained throughout cutting sequence

frame_analyses.description: Final cuts being made to complete circular pattern, gauze still secured
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task appears completed, gauze remains attached to clamps

frame_analyses.description: Hands removing cut gauze piece from trainer box for inspection
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed, examining cut pattern quality

confidence_rationale: Video quality and camera angle make precise measurement of cutting deviation difficult to assess. Gauze attachment and completion are clearly visible. Time measurement is reliable from instrument insertion to task completion.
cannot_determine: Precise deviation measurements at 8 cardinal points due to camera angle and video resolution
Exact cutting precision within 2mm tolerance - would require closer inspection of cut edges
technique_summary: Competent intermediate-level performance with smooth cutting technique and good instrument handling. Completion time of 72 seconds falls within intermediate range (60-180s).
improvement_suggestions: Cannot provide specific precision feedback due to video limitations
Time performance suggests room for improvement toward expert level (60-90s)
